transcript: Speaker A: Aa ammai ninnu anpadh ani annappudu English nercuko ani cheppindi kada. Idi enti roju antha reels chusthu kuchuntunnav. Nenu kuda roju antha reels chusthu undevadni. Naa pakkana unna vallu munduku vellipoyaru. Nenu matram akkade aagipoyanu. Mee time gurinchi aalochinchandi. Phone lo chala nerchukovachu. Ee SpeakX app ne chudandi. Indulo AI English teacher tho matladuthu nenu kevalam 2 vaarallo fluent ga English matladadam nerchukunnanu. Ippudu nenu prathi chota high-class English matladagalugutunnanu. Andaru nannu respect istunnaru. Mee life ni meeru decide cheskondi. Roju antha reels chusthu time waste cheyyala, leka SpeakX app use chesi samajam lo respect sampadinchala. [When that girl called you illiterate and told you to learn English, why are you sitting and watching reels all day? I also used to watch reels all day. People next to me moved forward, but I stayed in the same place. Think about your time. You can learn a lot on your phone. Look at this SpeakX app. By talking to the AI English teacher in this, I learned to speak fluent English in just 2 weeks. Now I can speak high-class English everywhere. Everyone respects me. Decide your life for yourself. Do you want to waste time watching reels all day, or use the SpeakX app to earn respect in society?]
on_screen_text: Aa ammai ninnu anpadh ani annappudu English nercuko ani cheppindi kada Idi enti roju antha reels chusthu kuchuntunnav Nenu kuda roju antha reels chusthu undevadni Naa pakkana unna vallu munduku vellipoyaru nenu matram akkade aagipoyanu Mee time gurinchi aalochinchandi Phone lo chala nerchukovachu Ee SpeakX app ne chudandi Indulo AI English teacher tho matladuthu nenu kevalam 2 vaarallo fluent ga English matladadam nerchukunnanu Ippudu nenu prathi chota high-class English matladagalugutunnanu Andaru nannu respect istunnaru Mee life ni meeru decide cheskondi roju antha reels chusthu time waste cheyyala leka SpeakX app use chesi samajam lo respect sampadinchala [Captions matching the spoken Telugu text]
summary: The presenter advises viewers to stop wasting time on social media reels and use their phones to learn English instead. She introduces the SpeakX app, explaining how its AI tutor helped her speak fluent English in two weeks and gain social respect. She challenges the audience to choose productivity over mindless scrolling.
